positive: A stylized, minimalist forest scene featuring abstract geometric fauna and flora. The main subject is a serene, stylized deer drinking from a highly reflective pool of water, surrounded by symmetrically placed glowing bioluminescent mushroom clusters and intricate fern silhouettes. Use a high-contrast, limited color palette of deep midnight blue, emerald green, and ethereal gold accents. The style should be a blend of Art Deco geometry and Japanese Sumi-e woodblock print techniques. Focus on crisp silhouettes, clean lines, and negative space. Composition should be centered and vertically balanced, optimized for apparel repeat printing. Studio lighting, crisp digital rendering, hyper-detailed.
